notes: P8: shares collection is get-by-id only (list:false rules-tested, no enumeration); 24-char crypto-random ids (~93 bits); member-only creates, shape-capped (type whitelist, hasOnly keys, rows<=30, string caps); immutable; creator/founder revoke. Snapshots carry display names only — no uids/emails. share.html escapes every rendered field; no app bundle, no tokens. secretlint CLEAN on touched files. 177/177 rules tests incl. 10 new shares tests; deployed staging+prod via agent-owned rules path (2026-06-09 grant).

LEGAL: (1) ParCoin untouched. (2) Privacy: public pages expose only member-chosen frozen snapshots (display names + points) — equivalent exposure to a member screenshotting the board, which terms already contemplate; revocation = delete, honored immediately (share.html shows taken-down state). (3) No new data collection; privacy.html unaffected. (4) UGC: snapshots are member-authored; creator+founder takedown path exists. (5) A11y: share.html semantic HTML, 4.5:1+ contrast on ink/paper, no interaction beyond one link.
